title: orchis provincialis proles pauciflora
intro: Orchis provincialis proles pauciflora, also known as the lesser butterfly orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of the lesser butterfly orchid include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies through methods such as infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional before consumption.
